event_name: Live Music at Rebel Kettle Brewing

seo.title: Live Music at Rebel Kettle Brewing — May 2026 | Metro Little Rock Events
seo.description: Free live music Saturday evenings at Rebel Kettle Brewing in Little Rock's SoMa District. Local acts, craft beer, and the best patio in the neighborhood.

description: Rebel Kettle Brewing hosts free live music on their patio most Saturday evenings, creating one of the most relaxed live music experiences in the metro. The backyard patio fills with a mix of SoMa residents, cyclists coming off the River Trail, and people who discovered the place and keep coming back. The beer program is serious — Rebel Kettle has been one of Little Rock's most acclaimed craft breweries since opening — and the no-cover policy means anyone can walk in and stay for the set. Local and regional acts span Americana, blues, jazz, and folk.
